title: Monday will not allow items from another board (mirrored filed) to be used in Integration with Google Calendar
excerpt:
To keep my data organized, I used a few boards and then I link them together using “connect boards”. However, the data from connected boards do not show when I try to automate with Google Calendar. 
Since I could not Do …

posts.author: art (Arthur)
posts.cookedHtml:
To keep my data organized, I used a few boards and then I link them together using “connect boards”. However, the data from connected boards do not show when I try to automate with Google Calendar.

Since I could not Do this through Monday, I tried to do it in Zappier. Then I have the same issue because the “mirror” fields don’t come up in Zapier.

Is there a solutions to this?

Here are some picture:

00111332×209 21.1 KB

0012596×616 23.7 KB

00131593×381 41.1 KB

0014820×757 38.3 KB

posts.author: Cailin88 (Cailin Barrett-Bressack)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m having this same problem! Would love to see this as a future improvement.

posts.author: Victoria_Martinez (Victoria Martinez)
posts.cookedHtml: Also have this same issue, apparently this a limited field.

posts.author: Jotemkin (Jordan Temkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I seem to have run into a similar issue as you. Were you ever able to solve syncing a mirrored column to google calendar? Or a work around?

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @art @Cailin88 @Victoria_Martinez @Jotemkin

You can go around this by syncing the value from the mirror column to a regular column and then using that in the integration.

Screenshot 2024-07-13 at 20.50.252176×392 18.7 KB

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column, here’s how it can be used in this case →

Also worth adding that it also supports -

  1. Automatically connecting items based on conditions and flexible logic.
  2. Automatically removing connecting.
  3. Syncing values between connected items.
  4. Cross-board automations (trigger in the connected board and action in the current board)

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform or here - Connected Boards Automations - monday.com App Marketplace

Hope that helps!
